logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync script with monitoring
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "User wants me to run a specific Jira sync script with given parameters.",
        "The script may take 5-15 minutes, so I need to start it in the background and monitor it.",
        "I should execute the script first, then set up monitoring by checking the debug log periodically.",
        "Once complete, I'll send a success notification; if failed, an error notification.",
        "The script path is: /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py",
        "Parameters: --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904"
    ],
    "headline": "Starting Jira sync script with monitoring",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 0,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py --filter-id 13811 --view-id 10489904 > /a0/usr/workdir/jira-debug.log 2>&1 &\necho \"Script started with PID: $!\"\n"
    }
}

thoughts: User wants me to run a specific Jira sync script with given parameters.
The script may take 5-15 minutes, so I need to start it in the background and monitor it.
I should execute the script first, then set up monitoring by checking the debug log periodically.
Once complete, I'll send a success notification; if failed, an error notification.
The script path is: /a0/usr/skills/jira/scripts/jira_reader.py

logs.heading: A0: Monitoring Jira sync progress
